title: 3 x Clear Lacquer Spray Paint
description: Directions Shake well before use. Test spray on a small area first. Apply thin coats, allowing for drying time between coats. Do not apply in temperatures below 10°C or above 30°C. Keep away from heat and open flames. Use in a well-ventilated area.
